prompt:
Dynamic luxury commercial advertisement poster featuring a surreal 3D rendered vibrant young woman, using the uploaded female face as reference, wearing high-end bright orange designer clothing, luxury accessories, and stylish gold sunglasses, confidently bursting out from a giant golden smartphone screen. Her pose is powerful and stylish, with one sneaker dramatically breaking through the digital display via strong forced perspective into reality.

Composition emphasizes her white luxury sneakers in the foreground with textured gum soles, enhanced by cinematic wide-angle lens distortion and shallow depth of field. Floating shiny 3D social media icons, golden geometric elements, and luxury branding graphics surround her, creating a high-end influencer marketing aesthetic.

Bright studio lighting creates a vibrant premium promotional atmosphere, with rich reflections on the metallic gold phone edges contrasting with matte fabric textures. The dominant orange, white, and gold palette delivers an ultra-modern luxury X / Twitter advertising vibe. Clean white background with bold editorial typography, premium software branding elements, elegant UI graphics, floating interactive icons, and a stylish QR code area.

Surreal 8K quality, cinematic shadows, sophisticated commercial art direction, luxury female energy, fashion marketing aesthetics, modern social media branding, shiny reflections, and high-end digital advertising style.

Aspect ratio: 3:4.
